meaning: n.(自行车等的)室内赛车场
examples: In Olympic Cycling, the RACES are held in a velodrome.
The Velodrome originally featured an athletics/cycling track and a football pitch.
Most nations lack a single velodrome, let alone access to state-of-the-art wind tunnels.
Storey regularly trains in Cheshire and the Peak District as well as at the Manchester Velodrome.
The 2012 velodrome is being constructed by ISG and has been designed by Hopkins Architects.
